'''ngazojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iguanomorph|iguanomorph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iguanomorph|iguanomorph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngazojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzejeth|ngæzejeth]] || [[word:ngæzejej|ngæzejej]] || [[word:ngæzejesh|ngæzejesh]] || [[word:ngæzeje|ngæzeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazozojoth|ngazozojoth]] || [[word:ngazozojoj|ngazozojoj]] || [[word:ngazozojosh|ngazozojosh]] || [[word:ngazozojo|ngazozojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazojoth|ngazojoth]] || [[word:ngazojoj|ngazojoj]] || [[word:ngazojosh|ngazojosh]] || [[word:ngazojo|ngazojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazofjoth|ngazofjoth]] || [[word:ngazofjoj|ngazofjoj]] || [[word:ngazofjosh|ngazofjosh]] || [[word:ngazofjof|ngazofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazojotho|ngazojotho]] || [[word:ngazojojo|ngazojojo]] || [[word:ngazojosho|ngazojosho]] || [[word:ngazojoko|ngazojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazojoth|ngazojoth]] || [[word:ngazojoj|ngazojoj]] || [[word:ngazojosh|ngazojosh]] || [[word:ngazojo|ngazojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazojothol|ngazojothol]] || [[word:ngazojojol|ngazojojol]] || [[word:ngazojoshol|ngazojoshol]] || [[word:ngazojokol|ngazojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazojothotho|ngazojothotho]] || [[word:ngazojojojo|ngazojojojo]] || [[word:ngazojoshosho|ngazojoshosho]] || [[word:ngazojoko|ngazojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazojothon|ngazojothon]] || [[word:ngazojojon|ngazojojon]] || [[word:ngazojoshon|ngazojoshon]] || [[word:ngazojokon|ngazojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazojothoro|ngazojothoro]] || [[word:ngazojojoro|ngazojojoro]] || [[word:ngazojoshoro|ngazojoshoro]] || [[word:ngazojokoro|ngazojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
